# workflow_port_parity/

Golden output parity fixtures for the seven linear workflow skill ports. Never edit by hand unless regenerating.

## Files

| File | What | When to read |
| ---- | ---- | ------------ |
| `arxiv-to-md.json` | Expected structured output contract for the arxiv-to-md workflow port | Regenerating fixtures, debugging `test_workflow_port_parity.py` failures for arxiv-to-md |
| `codebase-analysis.json` | Expected structured output contract for the codebase-analysis workflow port | Regenerating fixtures, debugging `test_workflow_port_parity.py` failures for codebase-analysis |
| `incoherence.json` | Expected structured output contract for the incoherence workflow port | Regenerating fixtures, debugging `test_workflow_port_parity.py` failures for incoherence |
| `leon-writing-style.json` | Expected structured output contract for the leon-writing-style workflow port | Regenerating fixtures, debugging `test_workflow_port_parity.py` failures for leon-writing-style |
| `planner_simple_feature.json` | Expected structured output contract for the planner workflow port (simple feature scenario) | Regenerating fixtures, debugging `test_workflow_port_parity.py` failures for planner |
| `prompt-engineer.json` | Expected structured output contract for the prompt-engineer workflow port | Regenerating fixtures, debugging `test_workflow_port_parity.py` failures for prompt-engineer |
| `refactor.json` | Expected structured output contract for the refactor workflow port | Regenerating fixtures, debugging `test_workflow_port_parity.py` failures for refactor |
